name: clock
author: hagency
description: Get current date and time in any timezone worldwide

tools.name: get_time
tools.description: Get the current date and time. Optionally specify a timezone (e.g. 'Europe/Stockholm', 'US/Eastern', 'Asia/Shanghai', 'UTC'). Returns formatted date, time, timezone offset, and day of week.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'Europe/Stockholm', 'Asia/Tokyo', 'US/Pacific', 'UTC'). Default: server local time.
